assertions.label: propose decision is NeedsApproval (tool routed to human-approval tier)
propose response includes a non-empty approvalId
GET /approvals/:approvalId returns HTTP 200 immediately after proposal
ApprovalPoller resolves approved=true after operator decision

notes: A tool call intercepted by the openclaw-plugin is blocked for human approval and the agent is unblocked exactly when the operator approves it via the Portarium control plane.
